items.title: Why did Victor Wembanyama take less than the max on his Spurs extension?
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Why did Victor Wembanyama take less than the max on his Spurs extension?

He told Jason Jones: “The reality of today’s NBA is that often, the potential of teams is not fulfilled because of money. I just want to make sure it’s never our case.”

Read: www.nytimes.com/athletic/746...
